settings.heading: About Moon Style Apparel
settings.text:
Established in 2012, Moon Style Apparel is a UK-based online fashion retailer dedicated to delivering stylish, comfortable, and high-quality clothing for everyday living. We believe fashion should be accessible, responsibly made, and designed to inspire confidence in every customer.

From wardrobe essentials to seasonal favourites, our collections combine timeless style with modern trends, offering versatile pieces for every occasion.
settings.image_alt: Clothing rails inside a modern apparel store

settings.title: Our story
settings.body:
Moon Style Apparel was founded with a simple vision: to create clothing that looks great, feels comfortable, and offers exceptional value without compromising on quality or responsibility.

Over the years, we have built long-term relationships with trusted manufacturing partners and suppliers, allowing us to maintain consistent quality while continually expanding our collections to meet the evolving needs of our customers.

Whether you're shopping for everyday basics, statement pieces, or seasonal essentials, our goal is to provide clothing you'll enjoy wearing for years to come.
settings.image_alt: Fashion designer working with fabric swatches

settings.title: Designed with quality in mind
settings.intro: Every garment is carefully selected and produced with attention to detail, comfort, and durability. Our collections include:
settings.items:
T-Shirts & Graphic Tees
Camis & Tank Tops
Hoodies & Sweatshirts
Button Front Shirts
Polos
Sweaters & Cardigans
Jeans
Trousers
Shorts
Jackets & Coats
Sweatpants
Seasonal Collections
New Arrivals
settings.note: We continuously update our range to bring fresh styles while maintaining the quality our customers expect.

settings.title: Our manufacturing
settings.body:
Quality begins long before a product reaches our customers. Our garments are produced through our experienced manufacturing partner, Moon Style Textile, where skilled teams combine modern production techniques with strict quality control standards.

With years of expertise in garment manufacturing, we oversee every stage of production to ensure consistency, craftsmanship, and reliability. By working closely with our manufacturing operations, we maintain greater control over product quality, ethical production, and customer satisfaction.
settings.image_alt: Spools of thread at a garment manufacturing facility

settings.title: Sustainability
settings.subtitle: We understand that the future of fashion depends on making responsible choices. Sustainability is an ongoing journey, and we continue to improve our practices across every part of our business.

settings.title: Organic cotton
settings.text: Where possible, we incorporate organic cotton into our collections. Organic cotton is grown using farming practices that reduce the use of synthetic chemicals while supporting healthier ecosystems and producing naturally soft, comfortable fabrics.

settings.title: Recycled polyester
settings.text: We increasingly use recycled polyester to help reduce waste and conserve valuable natural resources. Giving existing materials a second life contributes to a more sustainable fashion industry.

settings.title: Responsible sourcing
settings.text: We work with suppliers and manufacturing partners who share our commitment to ethical business practices, quality workmanship, safe working conditions, and responsible production standards.

settings.title: Less waste
settings.text: We continually review our production and packaging processes to reduce unnecessary waste — from improving operational efficiency to using more sustainable materials where possible.

settings.title: Ethics
settings.body:
Respect, fairness, and integrity guide every decision we make.

We support ethical manufacturing practices and believe everyone involved in creating our products deserves safe working conditions, fair treatment, and respect. We are committed to building long-term relationships with partners who share these values.
settings.image_alt: Team members working together around a table

settings.title: Charitable partner — SAVE DC
settings.body:
At Moon Style Apparel, we believe businesses should create a positive impact beyond fashion. Supporting communities and investing in brighter futures is an important part of who we are.

We are proud to support SAVE DC, an organisation dedicated to transforming lives through education. Their mission focuses on expanding educational opportunities, empowering individuals, and helping communities build a stronger future.

By partnering with SAVE DC, we are honoured to contribute to initiatives that create meaningful and lasting change through the power of education.

settings.title: Why choose Moon Style Apparel?
settings.items:
Established in 2012
UK-based online fashion retailer
High-quality garments at competitive prices
Trusted manufacturing expertise
New collections added regularly
Commitment to ethical and responsible sourcing
Focus on sustainability and reducing waste
Secure online shopping and reliable customer service
Proud supporter of educational and community initiatives

settings.title: Looking ahead
settings.body:
As we continue to grow, our commitment remains the same: creating quality clothing, embracing responsible business practices, and providing an exceptional shopping experience for every customer.

Thank you for choosing Moon Style Apparel. We're proud to be part of your wardrobe and look forward to serving you for many years to come.
